name: Parallel Burst Live Test Cycle (2 Runtimes)
description: Test-owned parallel work-item burst playbook used to prove multi-item dispatch with a two-runtime cap.
outcome: Independent burst work items are processed cleanly without cross-contamination under a two-runtime cap.

definition.process_instructions: Each work item title is a safe slug such as `parallel-burst-01`. Treat every work item as independent. For each work item, create exactly one concise artifact at logical path `parallel-burst/<work-item-title>.md` summarizing the result for that item. Persist the substantive result to artifacts, not only the handoff. Do not modify any repository. Before task completion, ensure one successful structured handoff is persisted with a unique request_id. Rejected validation attempts do not count.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this burst-processing workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: analysis
stages.goal: Each independent burst request has an artifact-backed result

checkpoints.name: analysis
checkpoints.goal: Each burst work item is completed with a durable artifact result.
checkpoints.entry_criteria: The work item has been created.
